g.text: Whisper Git · LLM-native UI sketch v2
Stable node IDs make screenshots editable by agents.
Virtualized rows; hover/selection/density are component defaults.
a18f2c3 Add retained UI inspector artifacts
36f90db Render SVG backend for headless review
Point-pick: node → role → source → style token
Artifacts: SVG + tree dump + lint + responsive tape
Buttons carry typed Msg actions; layout uses Fill/Hug/Fixed.
